sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41931" key="e(pta/eidos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑπτά-ειδος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n41931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing seven ingredients,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀντίδοτος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:78:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.78.22</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑξάειδος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
